content: agent2: implementing validate_nesting feature for Context (RuntimeError on unclosed children). Will touch src/click/core.py and src/click/shell_completion.py. Will try to keep changes additive/minimal to avoid conflicts.

agent2: heads up - my task overlaps heavily with yours. I'm adding Context(validate_nesting=False) param + child-context tracking in close()/__exit__, and updating shell_completion.py's _resolve_context (and related context-creation calls) to pass validate_nesting=False explicitly. Since we both touch _resolve_context, suggest: I'll own the validate_nesting plumbing in core.py's Context class (__init__, _make_sub_context, close, __exit__), and the specific line(s) in shell_completion.py that set validate_nesting=False on context creation. If you're wrapping context creation with 'with' statements there too, let's sync before either of us finalizes - please ping me with your diff of _resolve_context before you submit so I can merge cleanly.

agent2: done. Added Context(validate_nesting=False) param + _children tracking in core.py (__init__, close(), _make_sub_context()); shell_completion.py's _resolve_context now passes validate_nesting=False on all 3 make_context calls. Full diff written to patch.txt. No other core.py functions touched.
